characters.appearance: Human male, late 20s. Medium build, light complexion. Short dark hair, trimmed beard, dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Solid brown crew-neck t-shirt. White wireless earbuds.

characters.appearance: 3D animated male, 20s. Medium build, light complexion. Curly dark hair, dark eyes, thick black glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt under an open, short-sleeved purple shirt with a white leaf pattern.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Most people freeze when speaking English in an interview. Let's practice. Introduce yourself.
Character A says: Ah... I passed out in 2022.
Character B says: Almost! 'Passed out' means fainting. Say 'I graduated in 2022.'
Character A says: Oh, I graduated in 2022.
Character B says: Perfect! I'm Miss Nova. On Supernova, I analyze your exact level and build a plan just for you.
Character A says: But... practicing with an AI? What if I mess up?
Character B says: Make 1000 mistakes at 3 AM. I'll correct you 1000 times without judging. No one is watching.
Character A says: I've studied English for 12 years, but I still hesitate.
Character B says: Because you only read it! On Supernova, you actually SPEAK out loud.
Character A says: And if I don't understand the grammar?
Character B says: I explain the logic in Hindi, so it finally makes sense.
Character A says: So it's just like ChatGPT?
Character B says: ChatGPT gives you answers. I make you speak them.
Character A says: That sounds... actually helpful.
Character B says: Stop wasting hours scrolling reels. Give me just 15 minutes a day.
Character A says: Okay... teach me English.
Character B says: I will! But you have to do the talking.
Character A says: Ah... okay, Miss Nova!
Character B says: Install Supernova and start speaking today.
Character A says: Okay, okay! I'm downloading it.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Third-person hook avoids Meta G4.1 violation while setting up a relatable interview scenario.
- Rapidly delivers beats 'a' (personalization) and 'b' (privacy) in the first third of the dialogue.
- Stacks payload beats seamlessly: old methods, speaking vs reading, Hindi logic, and ChatGPT contrast.
- Closes with a strong negative/positive time anchor and a clean CTA without any price guarantees.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Most people freeze when speaking English in an interview.
Let's practice. Introduce yourself.
Ah... I passed out in 2022.
Almost! 'Passed out' means fainting. Say 'I graduated in 2022.'
Oh, I graduated in 2022.
Perfect! I'm Miss Nova.
I analyze your exact level and build a plan just for you.
But... practicing with an AI? What if I mess up?
Make 1000 mistakes at 3 AM.
I'll correct you without judging. No one is watching.
I've studied English for 12 years, but I still hesitate.
Because you only read it! On Supernova, you actually SPEAK out loud.
And if I don't understand the grammar?
I explain the logic in Hindi, so it finally makes sense.
So it's just like ChatGPT?
ChatGPT gives you answers. I make you speak them.
That sounds... actually helpful.
Stop wasting hours scrolling reels. Give me just 15 minutes a day.
Okay... teach me English.
I will! But you have to do the talking.
Ah... okay, Miss Nova!
Install Supernova and start speaking today.
Okay, okay! I'm downloading it.
